Founder's Note
D
David Pruwer
Co-Founder, OurRitual

Hi [First Name], David here.

In the thousands of sessions our Experts have facilitated, one theme comes up more than any other: Trust.

Trust isn't just about fidelity — it's about emotional safety. It's knowing your partner has your back in the small, everyday moments. Rebuilding or reinforcing trust takes patience, but it is deeply possible.

This month, we're focusing on the science of trust — how it's built, how it's broken, and how to mindfully repair it.

Warmly, David
Pathway Highlight

The Science of Trust

Building and maintaining trust throughout the ups and downs of a relationship can be hard. But how do you distinguish between a genuine breach of trust and an everyday lapse in communication?

Ask the Expert

Your Questions,
Answered

From the Community

"How do we communicate effectively right after trust has been broken?"

When trust is compromised, the brain goes into a defensive state. The first step is practicing 'listening to understand' rather than 'listening to respond.' Approach the conversation not to win an argument, but to understand the emotional reality of your partner. A step-by-step guide to this framework can help de-escalate tension and begin the mindful repair process.

Gabriela
OurRitual Expert Therapist
